messages.message:
We have 3 open positions:
1. Associate AI Developer / GenAI Developer (0-2 Years Experience)
2. Associate Backend Engineer (1+ Years Experience)
3. Full Stack Engineer (1+ Years Experience)
An Associate AI Developer / GenAI Developer works with artificial intelligence and generative AI. Our services include IoT, AI, Cloud, and Full Stack development.

We showcase innovative work with impactful digital experiences. Our projects include:
Android Apps (e.g., Ice Cream App, Personal Memory Assistance, Bus Fare NFC)
iOS Apps (e.g., Ice Cream App, Personal Memory Assistance, Food App)
Web Applications (e.g., Furniture Website)
Websites (e.g., CA Website, E-Commerce Web)
Nexployer (a product)
We can help you create a website. For detailed discussion, please fill out the enquiry form and our team will contact you shortly.
